reason: The image depicts a scene on a wooden ship with individuals wearing protective gear. While the ship and the general nautical theme are plausible for 1978, the clothing and protective gear worn by the individuals appear to be made of modern synthetic materials and the 'plexiglass' shields are significant anachronisms. Modern water proof jackets and headgear are also visible. These elements make the image unsuitable for representing the "Guerre des Baleines" in 1978 with complete historical accuracy.
